title: Wild Rift Patch Notes 7.0
paragraphs: New champion: Smolder released Jan 22, 2026. Stats reduced post-launch (armor growth 5->4.5, AD growth 5->4). Abilities weakened across the board.
Lee Sin BUFF: Base energy regeneration 50->60.
Ezreal BUFF: Arcane Shift cooldown reduced, mana cost lowered.
Kayle NERF: On-hit damage and health scaling reduced.
Master Yi NERF: True damage bonus decreased significantly.
Morgana CHANGE: Soul Shackles reworked with AP scaling instead of health scaling.
Renekton CHANGE: Fury generation mechanics overhauled, cooldowns adjusted.
New item: Guinsoo's Rageblade — attack speed with adaptive damage.
New item: Hollow Radiance — tank item with immolate effect.
Psychic Projector BUFF. Riftmaker BUFF. Serylda's Grudge BUFF. Spectral Sickle BUFF.
Harmonic Echo NERF: AP reduced. Phantom Dancer NERF: Cost increased.
Removed: Ancient Coin, Crystalline Reflector, Spirit Visage, Talisman of Ascension.
Changes to 19 items: significant reworks to mage, AD, tank, and support items.
